---
title: "Planning Roadmap"
order: 1
---

The roadmap is for anyone who needs to know about planned changes to the 
demand model. It contains high-level indicative areas of development that may
be subject to change in timing and/or scope as programme priorities shift.

This roadmap is updated quarterly.

### Last updated: yyyy-mm-dd

## Recently Completed 
(for full details see [model updates](https://connect.strategyunitwm.nhs.uk/nhp/project_information/project_plan_and_summary/model_updates.html))

- Companion application released, publicly available: ['Find opportunities to reduce hospital care'](https://connect.strategyunitwm.nhs.uk/tpma-explorer/)
- Companion application released, available on Connect server: ['Scenario Comparisons']()
- (internal) ICB modelling functionality
- Direct age-sex standardisation of all TPMAs
- Updated method to derive hospital catchments
- Delivery episodes added to downloadable model results

## Working on Now

- Companion application "Compare NHP Mitigation Assumptions"
- Inequalities removal functionality
- Refresh of health status adjustment distribution values following expert elicitation
- Access and quality assurance of refreshed baseline data

## Working on Next

- User interface development for ICB, regional and National modelling
- Implementation of updated waiting list adjustment module
- Site-level modelling capabilities
- Development of a National model scenario library

## Exploring

- Applications to support parameter elicitation at National and local levels
- Addition of novel TPMAs and model components
- Care-shift analysis support tools
